title: helleborine royleana
intro: Helleborine royleana, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helleborine royleana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Helleborine royleana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
